Detailed Description
--------------------

This file defines the structure and types used by video splitter filters. 




Includes
--------


- ``vlc_es.h`` (:ref:`file_C__Users_ahumeaub_Desktop_CLionProject_TestAffichageSynchrone_include_LibVLC_include_vlc_plugins_vlc_es.h`)

- ``vlc_picture.h`` (:ref:`file_C__Users_ahumeaub_Desktop_CLionProject_TestAffichageSynchrone_include_LibVLC_include_vlc_plugins_vlc_picture.h`)
